channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Telstra Outage and Death Investigation: No Link Found
item.description: Telstra has denied claims that its recent mass outage was connected to job cuts, as authorities investigate a death in South Australia linked to the incident. Communications Minister Anika Wells confi...

item.title: Manitoba Launches Flood Recovery Initiatives with $500 Cheques and Grant Programs
item.description: Manitoban officials have announced a comprehensive flood recovery plan following widespread flooding in western regions. Residents who applied for disaster financial assistance will receive $500 chequ...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Insights into 'Nurse the Dead' Cast's Preparation
item.description: The article highlights exclusive behind-the-scenes photos of the Philippine cast of 'Nurse the Dead,' showcasing their candid moments during filming. It features actors like Jelynn Malone, Anthony Jen...

item.title: Kentucky GOP Voter Demands Transparency on Mitch McConnell's Health
item.description: A Kentucky GOP voter, Rebecca Messinger, has publicly criticized Sen. Mitch McConnell (R-KY) for his lack of transparency regarding his health condition, which has kept him hospitalized. The voter, sp...

item.title: Trump's absence undermines Greek ambassador's influence
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump's decision not to visit Greece has embarrassed his ambassador, Kimberly Guilfoyle, who had promised to host him during his return trip from the NATO summit in Ankara. Insid...

item.title: Aussie Body Horror Film Critiques Ozempic Obsession
item.description: Saccharine is an Aussie body horror film that critiques the global obsession with weight-loss drugs like Ozempic. The story follows medical student Hanna, who joins a fad diet using human ash as a sec...

item.title: Supreme Court Dismisses Petition Against Comelec's Escudero Ruling
item.description: The Supreme Court (SC) en banc dismissed a petition seeking to overturn a Commission on Elections (Comelec) department ruling that cleared Senator Francis 'Chiz' Escudero over a P30-million campaign d...

item.title: Ottawa Councillors Criticize Unannounced Canada Day Fireworks Show
item.description: An unannounced fireworks display over downtown Ottawa late Thursday night sparked controversy among residents and local officials. Councillors expressed frustration over the decision, which was made b...

item.title: Netflix's 'Little House on the Prairie' Soundtrack Revealed
item.description: The latest adaptation of Laura Ingalls Wilder’s semi-autobiographical Little House books, developed by Rebecca Sonnenshine, has arrived on Netflix. This new series, not a continuation of the classic 1...

item.title: Governors Face Accountability for Security Issues Despite Limited Authority
item.description: Seyi Makinde, Oyo State Governor and APM presidential candidate, criticized state governors for being blamed on insecurity without constitutional powers to direct security agencies. During a meeting w...

item.title: Filipina biologist honored for biodiversity conservation achievements
item.description: Lisa Paguntalan-Marte, a Filipino environmentalist, has been selected as one of the recipients of the MIDORI Prize for Biodiversity 2026, an award established by the AEON Environmental Foundation. The...

item.title: Lucerne Valley brush fire spreads to multiple structures with ammunition explosions
item.description: A brush fire in Lucerne Valley, California, rapidly spread and ignited multiple homes and outbuildings, according to fire officials. The incident, initially reported as a small fire near Sunset Road a...

item.title: Inexperienced Springboks Prepare for Scotland Clash Despite Claims of Not Being a B Team
item.description: The South African rugby team, the Springboks, will face Scotland in a match at Loftus on Saturday with an inexperienced squad featuring 347 fewer caps than their previous encounter against England. As...

item.title: Exploring Canberra's Heritage Bus Shelters and Hidden Treasures
item.description: The article delves into the history of Canberra's historic timber bus shelters, detailing their evolution from interwar-era designs to post-WWII utilitarian structures. It highlights the significance ...

item.title: Kenya Airways redeploying Boeing 777-300ER after lease with Turkish Airlines ends
item.description: Kenya Airways has officially reclaimed its Boeing 777-300ER aircraft from Turkish Airlines following the expiration of their wet lease agreement. The aircraft, registered as 5Y-KZZ, has returned to Na...

item.title: Simba SC begins pre-season preparations for Kagame Cup
item.description: Simba SC, the Mainland Premier League giants, have confirmed they will report to their pre-season training camp on July 18 as they gear up for the 2025 CECAFA Kagame Cup. The regional tournament, host...

item.title: Political Missteps, Diplomatic Tensions, and Leadership Changes in Australia's Political Landscape
item.description: The article discusses a segment where political commentators Barrie Cassidy and Tony Barry analyse significant political errors made by Australian leaders this week. Key topics include Prime Minister ...

item.title: Legal Analyst Warns of Tough Questions for Todd Blanche Over Ties to Trump's Lawyer Boris Epshteyn
item.description: A legal analyst has warned that Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche will face intense scrutiny during his Senate Judiciary Committee confirmation hearing over his close ties to Boris Epshteyn, D...

item.title: Laboucane Maintains Lead in Rangeland Derby
item.description: The article highlights Laboucane's dominant performance at the Rangeland Derby, where he has extended his overall lead in the competition. Known for his aggressive riding style and strategic prowess, ...

item.title: Police arrest suspects linked to murder of anti-crime activist Thato Molosankwe
item.description: Police have arrested two men in connection with the murder of anti-crime activist Thato Molosankwe, describing the arrests as a major breakthrough in an investigation that has gripped the North West p...
